## How to Test

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm test` pass
- [ ] Tests cover new/changed behavior
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, commands, env vars, or architecture changed
- [ ] No secrets / generated files / deep imports
- [ ] ADR added (only if this changes architecture or a public contract)

## AI Assistance

- [ ] Parts of this PR were AI-generated (fine!) — I have reviewed and understand all of it
